user.title: STIB/MIVB Setup
user.description: Configure your STIB/MIVB public transport integration.

add_stop.title: Add a Stop
add_stop.description: Enter a line number to search for stops. You can add multiple stops.

confirm.title: Confirm configuration
confirm.description: Setup complete. You can manage stops later via the integration options.

error.invalid_line: Could not find any stops for this line. Please check the line number.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the STIB/MIVB API. Please try again.
error.no_stops_selected: Please select at least one stop.
